The following events took place in approximately '''3,000,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*An asteroid collides with the planet [[Vinsoth/Legends|Vinsoth]], killing most life on its surface. The remaining survivors evolve into the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
